intent: Soft project-level visual continuity for all generated scenes.
theme: modern dark tech explainer with product/UI clarity
typography: clean modern sans; strong but not decorative; CJK-friendly
subtitles: bottom-safe, high contrast, word highlights allowed; prioritize readability over ornament
motion: frame-driven Remotion animation; soft push, glow pulse, measured transitions
freedom: Scene briefs, user tuning, and uploaded references may override this guide when needed.
avoid: busy decoration that competes with captions
